zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Percy於1447年1月10日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁萊康費爾德時，他的父親Ralph Percy21歲，母親Lady Eleanor Acton22歲。他於大約1475年與Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1510年1月11日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Percy于1447年1月10日出生在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁萊康費爾德时，他的父亲Ralph Percy21岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Acton22岁。他于大约1475年与Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1510年1月11日在英国英格兰諾福爾可享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Percy was born on 10 January 1447, in Leconfield, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Percy, was 21 and his mother, Lady Eleanor Acton, was 22. He married Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy about 1475, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 11 January 1510, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Percy est né le 10 janvier 1447, à Leconfield, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Percy, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Acton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy environ 1475, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1510, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Percyが1447年1月10日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングレコンフィールドで生まれた時，父Ralph Percyは21歳，母Lady Eleanor Actonは22歳であった。約1475年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでLady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1510年1月11日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Percy(이)가 1447년 1월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 렉필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Percy(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Acton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1475년 영국 요르크실르에서 Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1510년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Percy родился 10 января 1447 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Percy было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Acton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Annah "Anne" James, Baroness Hungerford and Percy около 1475 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 11 января 1510 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
